examples.title: Single Inheritance Example
examples.description: Demonstrates single inheritance with base class Person and derived class Student
examples.explanation: Shows basic single inheritance, protected members usage, constructor/destructor order - base constructor runs before derived constructor, destructor runs in reverse order

examples.title: Multiple Inheritance with Ambiguity Resolution
examples.description: Demonstrates multiple inheritance and how to resolve ambiguity using scope resolution operator
examples.explanation: Demonstrates ambiguity in multiple inheritance when same-named functions exist in both base classes. Shows use of :: operator to specify which base class member to access

examples.title: Virtual Base Class - Diamond Problem Solution
examples.description: Shows how virtual inheritance solves the diamond problem
examples.explanation: Virtual inheritance ensures only one copy of Base class exists in MostDerived, solving the diamond problem. Constructor of virtual base (Base) is called by most derived class (MostDerived), not by intermediate classes

examples.title: Protected Inheritance Example
examples.description: Demonstrates protected inheritance and its effects on member accessibility
examples.explanation: Protected inheritance changes accessibility: public members become protected, protected remain protected, private remain inaccessible. These protected members are still accessible in further derived classes
